summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Tom Certo app. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend flows all working correctly including activation screen, login with TEST-DEV2026, main screen with mic button, platform_limit modal on web, and logout.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver not supported on web (expected, JS fallback used) - warnings in console but no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET has a hardcoded default value 'tom-certo-secret-key-2024-change-in-prod' - should be required env var in production
Admin endpoints /api/admin/tokens and /api/admin/seed-test-token have no authentication - should be protected in production
DB_NAME uses os.environ.get with default 'tom_certo_db' instead of os.environ[] for fail-fast behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: App fully functional. Token TEST-DEV2026 is seeded. Login flow: activation screen -> enter token -> main screen with yellow mic button. Tapping mic on web shows 'Aviso' modal (platform_limit is expected). Logout returns to activation screen. Active screen not testable on web (requires native mic access).
